description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the julia:1.2 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs apt-get -qq update; apt-get -y install git and then julia --project=@. -e "import Pkg; Pkg.build()". Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs julia --project=docs -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.instantiate(); Pkg.develop(PackageSpec(path=pwd()))', then julia --project=docs --color=yes docs/make.jl, and moves the generated docs with mv docs/build public, publishes the public directory as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
